name: Codeium / Windsurf
what_it_does: AI code assistant with free tier for individual developers and enterprise offering. Codeium provides IDE extensions (VS Code, JetBrains, Vim, etc.) for AI code completion, search, and explanation. Also offers Windsurf IDE — a VS Code fork with deeper AI integration including agent-style multi-file edits and conversation. Enterprise version includes on-premises deployment and code customization on your own codebase (Codeium Enterprise). Free individual tier has no token limits.
use_cases: Provide free unlimited AI code completion to development teams without per-seat costs via Codeium's free individual tier
Deploy Codeium Enterprise on-premises for teams with data residency requirements — LLM runs on your infrastructure
Use Windsurf IDE for AI-assisted agent development workflows — multi-file editing, codebase search, and conversational AI in one IDE
Customize code suggestions to your company's coding patterns using Codeium Enterprise's codebase fine-tuning
Enable AI code assistance in any IDE via Codeium's broad plugin ecosystem (VS Code, IntelliJ, Vim, Neovim, Emacs)
not_for: Automated code generation pipelines without a developer in the loop — Codeium is an IDE assistant, not an autonomous coding agent API
Teams wanting programmatic API access for code generation in CI/CD — use GitHub Copilot API or direct LLM APIs for programmatic code generation
Teams committed to GitHub ecosystem — GitHub Copilot integrates better with GitHub Actions and GitHub features
best_when: Development teams wanting free AI code completion without per-seat costs, or enterprises needing on-premises AI code assistance with codebase customization.
avoid_when: You need a programmatic code generation API for automation pipelines — Codeium is an interactive IDE tool, not an inference API.

auth.notes: Individual: sign in with Google/GitHub. Enterprise: SSO via SAML/OIDC. IDE extension uses token from authentication flow. No public API key for external access — IDE-integrated auth only.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: unlimited completions for individual developers. No token limits, no expiry.
pricing.paid_tiers: Teams from $12/user/month; Enterprise custom (includes on-premises and codebase customization)
pricing.notes: Individual free tier is genuinely unlimited — unlike many competitors. Teams adds collaboration features and centralized admin. Enterprise adds on-premises deployment and custom model training on your codebase.

performance.rate_limits: No rate limits on individual free tier. Enterprise: resource-limited by your own infrastructure.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: IDE extension provides completion suggestions — no traditional error responses. Error states are surfaced as IDE status bar notifications. Enterprise API errors logged server-side.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Code completions are stateless — each completion request is independent. No server-side state. Completion suggestions may vary due to LLM non-determinism.
known_agent_gotchas: No public REST/API — Codeium is IDE-only; programmatic code generation requires using a different tool
Windsurf IDE is separate from Codeium IDE extensions — different products with different feature sets
Enterprise on-premises requires significant GPU infrastructure (NVIDIA A100/H100 recommended) — not a lightweight self-hosted option
Codebase context is built from the local workspace index — suggestions improve after indexing completes (can take minutes for large repos)
IDE extension quality varies by IDE — VS Code has best feature parity; some IDEs have limited functionality

security_score_components.security_notes: SOC2 Type II. GDPR compliant. Enterprise on-premises means code never leaves your infrastructure. Individual tier processes code snippets through Codeium's cloud — evaluate before using with proprietary code. SSO/SAML for enterprise.
